title: dregeochloa pumila
intro: Dregeochloa pumila is a plant species commonly known as Korean mint or dwarf mint, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dregeochloa pumila include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
